assertions.evidence: Phase 1 item #1 is README.md with detailed content guidance

assertions.text: Recommends creating CLAUDE.md or AGENTS.md for AI tooling
assertions.evidence: Phase 2 item #4 is CLAUDE.md with a worked example

assertions.text: Mentions at least one of: SECURITY.md, CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md, CHANGELOG.md
assertions.evidence: Mentions CHANGELOG.md (Phase 3), CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md (Phase 3). SECURITY.md is not mentioned.

assertions.text: Prioritizes the docs — distinguishes immediate vs. later
assertions.evidence: Organized into 4 phases with explicit priority ordering

assertions.text: Specifically addresses AI-readability: commands in CLAUDE.md, type annotations, or docstrings
assertions.evidence: CLAUDE.md section includes exact commands and explains why architecture context prevents wrong AI suggestions; docstrings section explains AI reads them

assertions.text: Recommends documenting build/test/lint commands in a machine-readable or explicit way
assertions.evidence: CLAUDE.md example includes `pytest`, `ruff check src/`, `mypy src/` as exact commands
